name: SAML Token Forgery - AD FS Token Signing Certificate Abuse
description: Detects SAML token forgery (Golden SAML) via AD FS token-signing certificate extraction, AD FS database access, and anomalous SAML assertions without corresponding AD FS authentication events.
query: (event.code: ("510" or "1007") and winlog.provider_name: "AD FS Auditing") or (event.code: "4662" and winlog.event_data.ObjectType: *certificateAuthority*) or (process.command_line: (*AdfsConfiguration* or *IdentityServerPolicy* or *ServiceSettingsData*))
